question_text: What is your favorite art style?
Which of the following art styles do you find most visually appealing?
On a scale of 1 to 5, how familiar are you with the term "Avant-Garde"?
Have you ever tried creating art in the style of Cubism?
Do you have a preferred time period for art styles (e.g., Renaissance, Baroque, Modern)?
Which art style do you think is most influential in contemporary design?
How often do you visit art museums or galleries?
Are there any art styles that you actively dislike?
In your opinion, what distinguishes one art style from another?
Would you consider "Digital Art" to be a legitimate art style?
